message:
feat(ufunc): add np.linalg.vecdot (NumPy 2.0) with batch/axis support; fix io formatting

- Implement UFuncArray::vecdot() computing the dot product of
  corresponding vectors along a specified axis (default: last),
  supporting batch dimensions — for inputs with shape (..., n), returns
  shape (...), matching NumPy 2.0's np.linalg.vecdot semantics
- Add vecdot_1d, vecdot_batched, and vecdot_axis0 tests covering scalar
  output, batch processing, and non-default axis selection
- Fix formatting of decode_unicode_element error message (line wrap only,
  no logic change)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
